title: Limerick
author: Greg Ross
summary:
A certified poet from Slough,
Whose methods of rhyming were rough,
Retorted, “I see
That the letters agree
And if that’s not sufficient I’m through.”

— Clifford Witting
full_text:
A certified poet from Slough,

Whose methods of rhyming were rough,

Retorted, “I see

That the letters agree

And if that’s not sufficient I’m through.”

— Clifford Witting
